top_signals.title: Oil Markets Are In Deficit, But Not Shortage, Sen Says
top_signals.summary: Amrita Sen of Energy Aspects of says oil markets are in a "massive deficit," but not a shortage yet. She is also worried because an anticipated reopening date for the Strait of Hormuz keeps getting pushed out. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
